name: Athasian Aarakocra
description: Humanoid. Medium. Athasian aarakocra are swift aerial hunters of the wastes. Flight: you have a flying speed of 50 feet, but you can't use it while wearing medium or heavy armor or while encumbered. Talons: your talons are natural weapons that deal 1d4 + Strength modifier slashing damage in place of the normal bludgeoning damage for an unarmed strike.
